title: Fermented Crumble Bites
description: A sweet and tangy dessert with a crispy topping, perfect for a snack or dessert.

ingredients.name: Crumble Topping
ingredients.notes: Mix of flour, yeast, sugar, and butter

instructions: Mix together the crumble topping ingredients until crumbly.
Add the crispy oat topping to the crumble topping and mix until well combined.
Press the mixture into a baking dish.
Add the fermented apple compote on top of the crumble mixture.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the topping is golden brown.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
